name: Пълна документация: публикуване в Huawei AppGallery и RuStore

entries.value: To add an app, open the RuStore Console, go to the Applications tab, click 'Add an app', and in the pop-up window enter the app name. Select the type of application in the 'Type' section: a non-game app or a game. Select the added app and click 'Upload a new version'. The upload steps vary depending on the app type: Universal (suitable for phone, tablet, and TV) or TV Only; if you select Universal you will also be prompted to fill in information for the TV version. When uploading a version you need to: specify the app parameters; make sure you have uploaded screenshots for the mobile app version (mandatory); fill in information about the categories and types of data the application requests access to, as well as sensitive permissions; for paid apps enter the price and select the app release options. Then submit for moderation once the form is complete and the app files have been successfully uploaded and processed. Icon: uploaded image size 512x512 px, only .jpeg and .png accepted, file size not exceeding 3 MB; the icon must have background fill across its entire area, outer edges covered by background, no transparent or unfilled areas along the outline. You can also add a separate icon for the TV version via 'Add icon for TV'. Screenshots: you can add 1 to 10 screenshots at the same time; uploading screenshots for the mobile version is mandatory; you can select vertical or horizontal orientation and specify the screenshot type (phone or tablet); if you add screenshots for phones only, the same screenshots are shown on both phones and tablets; separate tablet screenshots appear on screens 7 inches or larger while phone screenshots appear on screens smaller than 7 inches; screenshots must accurately depict the mechanics and functionality of the app or game, not merely the title, login page, splash screen or artwork, and should not include Android/other-app interface elements or not-yet-implemented functionality. Supported formats APK and AAB. Moderation: before publication the app passes mandatory review; moderators go through the entire user journey to verify the app works, corresponds to the declared category and age rating, and poses no security risks; review takes on average about 1 hour with clear feedback. (Източник: https://www.rustore.ru/help/en/developers/publishing-and-verifying-apps/app-publication)

entries.key: RuStore — качване на нова версия на приложение
entries.value: Select the added app and click 'Upload a new version'. Choose app type Universal (phone, tablet, TV) or TV Only. Contact details are required in new app versions, with values automatically pulled from previous versions for subsequent updates: Email is a required field; VK group and website are optional. The 'What's new?' section is filled in when uploading a new version, where you describe the main updates - features added or bugs fixed. Brief (short) description of the application: up to 80 characters. Detailed description of the application: up to 4000 characters (when creating it, account for the user's ability to minimize the description to 2000 characters). When uploading multiple APK files you can upload no more than 10 files. Processed files are stored for 14 days; if you do not submit them for moderation within this time they are deleted. RuStore supports APK and AAB formats. When submitting an APK, ensure it carries the same signature as used in other app stores (e.g. Google Play) so users can update installed apps. (Източник: https://www.rustore.ru/help/en/developers/publishing-and-verifying-apps/app-publication/new-version-app)

To set an age rating on RuStore: open the RuStore Console, click the 'Applications' tab, choose an application, select a required app version, go to the 'Age rating' block, select one of the restriction options from the drop-down list, and click 'Save'. You should specify an age rating when publishing an app or a new version if the update introduces potentially inappropriate content for a certain age group; this information helps RuStore users decide whether to install the application. Age ratings apply to all applications published on RuStore and help users understand whether an app contains potentially inappropriate content for a certain age group. Age ratings are not related to the app target group and have nothing to do with a game's complexity. Ensure the app is labeled with the appropriate age category; if uncertain about the applicable age limits, refer to the guidelines for age classification. (Източник: https://www.rustore.ru/help/en/developers/publishing-and-verifying-apps/app-publication/new-version-app/age-restrictions)

RuStore separates the catalog into 'Applications' and 'Games' tabs - non-game apps are on the 'Applications' tab and games on the 'Games' tab. Categories include (among others): Communication (for social networks), Books (audiobooks and children's literature), Sports, Education, For Parents (child and parental apps), Business Services, Finance, Health & Medicine (pharmacy and medical services), Food & Dining (restaurants, cafes, food delivery), Photos & Videos, Health & Fitness, News, Transportation, Entertainment, Weather, Social, Tools. Do not select the 'Entertainment' category for games - RuStore has separate categories for games. (Източник: https://www.rustore.ru/help/en/developers/publishing-and-verifying-apps/app-publication/new-version-app/category)

In RuStore Console you can run a closed test of a new app version before publishing. Alpha testing helps fix technical issues before they reach a large audience. To add testers: in the left panel of the RuStore Console go to Testing > Alpha testing > Testers, click 'Invite tester', and in the dialog enter the tester's VK ID(s) - a single VK ID or a comma-separated list of VK IDs. A link to the test version is generated automatically so you can share it with testers via email, messenger, etc. The VK ID you specify in RuStore must match the one under which the tester logs into the app. You can add up to 2000 testers for one alpha version to organize testing even for large projects. (Източник: https://www.rustore.ru/help/en/developers/publishing-and-verifying-apps/app-publication/testing/alpha-testing)

entries.key: RuStore — управление на ключове за подписване (APK и AAB)
entries.value: When submitting an APK to the RuStore Console, ensure it carries the same signature as used in other app stores (e.g. Google Play); one of the most common mistakes is using different signatures for an app published on RuStore versus other stores. For AAB, the application signature must be added separately before loading the .aab file: generate an upload key (key pair) using keytool with the RSA algorithm to sign the Android App Bundle; use the PEPK tool to export and encrypt the private key; upload the resulting ZIP archive and the upload key certificate in .PEM format in the RuStore Console. When migrating from .apk to .aab, the signing certificate must match the signature fingerprint of the previous version. (Източник: https://www.rustore.ru/help/en/developers/publishing-and-verifying-apps/app-publication/apk-signature)

RuStore supports uploading applications in AAB (Android App Bundle) format. Application signatures must be added separately before loading the .aab file. Generate an upload key that signs the .aab, use the PEPK tool to export and encrypt the private key, and upload the resulting ZIP archive and certificate (upload key certificate in .PEM format) in the RuStore Console before uploading the bundle. (Източник: https://www.rustore.ru/help/en/developers/publishing-and-verifying-apps/app-publication/new-version-app/upload-aab)

The uploaded icon image size is 512x512 px; only .jpeg and .png files are accepted, with file size not exceeding 3 MB. The icon must have background fill across its entire area, with its outer edges covered by the background and no transparent or unfilled areas along the outline. (Източник: https://www.rustore.ru/help/en/work-with-rustore-api/api-upload-publication-app/apk-icon-upload)

You can upload no more than 10 files when uploading multiple APK files to RuStore. Processed files are stored for 14 days; if you do not submit them for moderation within this time, they are deleted. Ensure the APK carries the same signature as used in other app stores so users can update installed apps whenever a newer version is available on RuStore. RuStore supports uploading applications in APK and AAB formats. (Източник: https://www.rustore.ru/help/en/work-with-rustore-api/api-upload-publication-app/apk-file-upload/file-upload-apk)

entries.key: RuStore — плащания в приложението и абонаменти
entries.value: RuStore supports in-app payments and subscriptions. Product types: Consumable products can be purchased more than once and used in the app (e.g. health boosts, hints, crystals, coins in games); Non-consumable products can be purchased only once and cannot be 'spent' (e.g. ad removal, a hidden level, a premium item). Authorization: when paying for subscriptions users must authorize with VK ID; for in-app product purchases an email is enough to send the invoice. To validate a successful purchase on your server, use the invoiceId from the ProductPurchaseResult model returned after a successful product purchase. Support for the BillingClient SDK ends on August 1, 2026, after which payments will no longer be processed for any purchases, including subscriptions; the Pay SDK is the recommended replacement for new and existing projects. (Източник: https://www.rustore.ru/help/en/guides/payments)

You can add screenshots for phones only, in which case the same screenshots are displayed on both phones and tablets; alternatively upload separate tablet screenshots (phone screenshots show on screens smaller than 7 inches, tablet screenshots on screens 7 inches or larger). If the app's APK or AAB is suitable for TV, you must also upload TV screenshots and a TV banner. For TV apps RuStore supports resolutions from 320p to 4K. You can drag screenshots into the 'Phone App Screenshots' area or click 'Add tablet screenshots'. Screenshots should refrain from including interface elements from Android or other apps and functionality not yet implemented or not present in the app. (Източник: https://www.rustore.ru/help/en/developers/publishing-and-verifying-apps/app-publication/new-version-app/adding-an-app-for-a-tv-device)

entries.key: Huawei — регистрация и квалификация на разработчик
entries.value: Complete Guide to Developer Qualification and Account Registration. Before officially developing and launching an application, developers must obtain legal developer qualifications and complete registration and real-name authentication of a Huawei Developer account. Both individuals and enterprises must have developer qualifications to publish and manage applications on the AppGallery Connect (AGC) platform. Account Type Selection: Individual Account - suitable for individual developers, simple registration, ideal for small applications or personal projects; Enterprise Account - suitable for companies and organizations, supporting multi-person collaboration and enterprise-level services, requiring a business license. Recommendation: prioritize registering an enterprise account, which facilitates subsequent qualification review, ad integration, and application promotion. Detailed Registration Process: 1. Visit developer.huawei.com. 2. Click Register and fill in basic information (email, phone, secure password). 3. Verification and login. 4. Real-name authentication - Individual: upload photos of front and back of ID card, fill in real name and ID number; Enterprise: upload business license, legal representative's ID card, and enterprise information. 5. Wait for review - real-name authentication usually completed within 1-3 working days; after approval all developer functions become available. Common pitfalls: inconsistent information (registration must match documents exactly); blurry/non-compliant photos (must be clear, unobstructed, free from reflections and watermarks); enterprise legal person changes must be re-authenticated; check spam folder for verification emails. (Източник: https://dev.to/xhunmon/complete-guide-to-developer-qualification-and-account-registration-170g)

entries.key: Huawei — създаване на приложение в AppGallery Connect
entries.value: Complete Guide to Creating an App in AppGallery Connect. Prerequisites: a registered Huawei Developer Account; completed identity verification (individual or enterprise); basic application information prepared; development environment with DevEco Studio and HarmonyOS SDK. Steps: Access AppGallery Connect - visit the AGC Console, log in with your Huawei Developer Account, click My Projects. Create a New Project - enter a project name, select a project time zone, click Create. Add an Application - click Add App and fill in: Platform; Device (Phone, Tablet, Smart TV); App Name (matching app.json5); Default Language; Package Name (unique, matching bundleName). Obtain Configuration - Project Settings > General Information: App ID, Client Secret, OAuth 2.0 Client ID. Configuring Project Files: app.json5 (bundleName must match AGC package name; versionCode; versionName; minAPIVersion, targetAPIVersion); module.json5 (entry point, supported device types, permissions, background modes); agconnect-services.json downloaded from AGC placed in project root. Filling in Application Information for Release: Basic Information - app name; icon (216x216px PNG); 3-5 screenshots; detailed description; version changes/What's New. Categorization and Pricing - category and subcategory; free or paid; age rating. Contact Information - developer email for review; developer phone; Privacy policy URL. Common Issues: Package Name Mismatch (bundleName must exactly match AGC package name); missing agconnect-services.json; unsupported device types; API version compatibility. (Източник: https://dev.to/xhunmon/complete-guide-to-creating-an-app-in-appgallery-connect-o81)

entries.key: Huawei — спецификации за икона и екранни снимки (визуални материали)
entries.value: Huawei AppGallery Screenshot Specifications. Android Native Apps - Mobile App Visual Assets: Quantity 3 to 8; Resolution 800x450 / 450x800 px; Format & Max Size: PNG, JPG, or JPEG (2 MB), WEBP (100 KB). Note: the length of the app screenshot sides must range from 320 to 3840 pixels. Watch App Visual Assets: 3 to 8; 180x240 px; PNG/JPG/JPEG (5 MB); WEBP (100 KB). Vision App Visual Assets: 5 to 8; 1920x1080 / 1280x720 px; PNG/JPG/JPEG (2 MB); WEBP (100 KB). Quick Apps - Mobile: 3 to 8; 800x450 / 450x800 px; PNG/JPG/JPEG (5 MB); WEBP (100 KB). HarmonyOS Apps - Mobile (Landscape): 3 to 5; 800x450 px; PNG/JPG/JPEG (2 MB). Mobile (Portrait): 3 to 5; 450x800 px; PNG/JPG/JPEG (2 MB). Watch: 4 to 8; 840x840 px. Vision: 5 to 8; 1920x1080 / 1280x720 px. App icon resolution: 216x216 px or 512x512 px; PNG (max 2 MB) or WEBP (max 100 KB). (Източник: https://appradar.com/blog/huawei-app-gallery-app-screenshot-sizes)

entries.key: Huawei — пълен процес по пускане на приложение
entries.value: Full-Cycle Process: Releasing an App in HUAWEI AppGallery. Preparation Requirements: a Huawei developer account, supported language list, app name per language (max 64 characters), introduction text (max 8000 characters), brief introduction (max 80 characters), app icon (216x216px PNG, under 2MB), minimum three screenshots (450x800px preferred, 9:16 ratio, max 2MB each), privacy policy URL, and APK file. Accessing AppGallery: Navigate to the Huawei Developers website, select console, choose HUAWEI AppGallery from the Distribution and Promotion section; this opens AppGallery Connect. Creating a New Application: Select the New button, complete the form, click Create to proceed to the App Information page. App Information Section - Localization: for each added language provide Name, Introduction and Brief Introduction; for an update fill the New features section. Visual Assets: icon square 216x216 px PNG (2 MB); screenshots 9:16 ratio, minimum three. Save and proceed to Version Information. Version Information Section - Geographic Availability: select countries and regions; if Chinese mainland is selected you must prepare Copyright information. APK Upload: upload the apk file (up to 2 GB) via Manage package. Pricing Configuration: set the app price. Content Rating: select one of five options according to the description. Privacy Policy: provide a URL. Review Information (Optional): provide login data to ease review. Release Schedule: establish a specific release date. Submission: click save and submit; missing data is highlighted in red. Review Timeline: should be completed in three to five workdays; from experience it can take up to two weeks. (Източник: https://fivedottwelve.com/blog/application-release-in-huawei-appgallery/)

entries.key: Huawei — метаданни на листинга (лимити на символи и категории)
entries.value: Huawei AppGallery Metadata Field Requirements. App Name: between 3 and 64 characters, with no special characters or competitor brand names allowed. Brief Introduction: up to 80 characters for the short description field, though only approximately 35 characters display in preview. Introduction/Full Description: between 100 and 8,000 characters - notably double the capacity of Apple App Store and Google Play Store. New Features: up to 1000 characters describing app improvements after updates. Categories: Two primary categories (Apps and Games) with 17 subcategories under Apps and 6 subcategories under Games. (Източник: https://appradar.com/blog/huawei-appgallery-app-store-optimization-aso)

entries.key: Huawei — листинг стъпка по стъпка и полета в конзолата
entries.value: Huawei AppGallery Listing Process. Prerequisites: your app in Android APK format; app information (name, introductions, icon, screenshots); developer documentation (DUNS number for companies or legal ID for individuals). Step 1: Developer Account Registration - register at the Huawei Developer portal, selecting either Individual or Company status. Enterprise developers must provide a DUNS number or Business Registry Code with license copy. Identity verification takes 1-2 business days. Step 2: Access AppGallery Connect - Navigate from the Developer Console, click My apps and select the New button. Step 3: Initial App Setup - enter app name and upload the APK package; select whether your app is an app or game (permanent choice); choose a default language. Step 4: Upload Content Assets - Name: max 64 characters; Introduction: up to 8,000 characters; Brief introduction: 80 characters maximum; New features: 1,000 character limit; App icon: 216x216 PNG; Screenshots: minimum three images, JPG/JPEG/PNG, max 2MB each, 16:9 (landscape) or 9:16 (portrait) aspect ratio. Step 5: Localization - up to 78 languages. Step 6: Categorization & Submission - select primary category, Level-2 category, and Level-3 subcategory; complete contact details; input privacy policy URL; submit for review. Approval takes 3-5 working days. (Източник: https://phiture.com/asostack/listing-on-appgallery-a-step-by-step-guide-and-a-glance-of-the-developer-console-4dcc6169a7c0/)

entries.key: Huawei — публикуване в AGC (вкл. подпис), издание 2023-2024
entries.value: AppGallery Connect Publishing Guide - Step-by-Step Process. 1. Account Setup & Team Management - Navigate to Users and Permissions to add team members (Add new member; account type Email/Mobile; contact email; access expiration). 2. Create New Application - from My Applications, click Create new application, complete the form. 3. App Information Configuration - select device compatibility (phone, tablet, watch); complete general app details following character limits; upload icon (216x216 px or 512x512 px, PNG max 2MB or WEBP max 100KB); submit device preview images (3-8 images, 800x450 px or 450x800 px); select single application category. 4. Version Information Setup - confirm target country/region; optionally enable Open Testing mode for beta releases with specified start/end dates. 5. Application Version Upload - always upload an App Bundle File rather than APK files for compatibility across device architectures. 6. Signing Certificate Registration - generate signing certificate using keytool: keytool -export -rfc -keystore <keystorename> -alias <alias> -file <name>.pem; upload the resulting .pem file to the platform. 7. Complete Required Information - payment information; content rating; privacy policy details; provide test credentials for app reviewers; include account deletion demonstration. 8. Product Deployment - choose immediate release or scheduled release; submit for review. 9. Track Progress - monitor status in Version History. (Източник: https://medium.com/@codemax120/guide-to-publish-applications-in-app-gallery-connect-version-2023-2024-ae1142504ba9)

Certificate Generation for Huawei App Gallery - keystore and certificate operations: Listing Existing Certificates: keytool.exe -list -v -keystore linesgame.keystore. Creating a New Certificate: keytool.exe -genkey -v -keystore linesgame.keystore -alias linesgame-huawei -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 100000. Removing a Certificate: keytool.exe -delete -alias linesgame-huawei -keystore linesgame.keystore. Exporting to PEM Format: keytool.exe -export -rfc -keystore linesgame.keystore -alias linesgame-huawei -file linesgame-huawei.pem. Verifying AAB Signature: keytool -printcert -jarfile android-build-release.aab. Converting Keystore Format to PKCS12: keytool -importkeystore -srckeystore <path>\linesgame.keystore -destkeystore <path>\linesgame.keystore -deststoretype pkcs12. Signing an AAB File: jarsigner -verbose -sigalg SHA1withRSA -digestalg SHA1 -keystore [path to keystore] -signedjar [output signed file].aab [path to unsigned aab] [keystore alias]. За услугите на Huawei е нужен SHA-256 отпечатъкът. (Източник: https://developernote.com/2023/05/generating-a-certificate-for-huawei-app-gallery/)

Huawei AppGallery Age Rating System Details. Rating Levels: five age categories: 3+, 7+, 12+, 16+ and 18+ content (some sources list 15+ instead of 16+). Age Rating Questionnaire: developers must complete ratings based on their app's content and features. Users can also set a default app age system on AppGallery to match the content related to the age selection. Detected Behavior Categories: the system automatically identifies bad language, regulated items and activities, simulated gambling, monetary payments, law and ethics, user interaction, user information collection, and more. Rating Assignment Process: following developer questionnaire completion, the system automatically detects the behavior of the app according to submission category; the ratings that match this behavior will be rated accordingly based on the requirement of the corresponding app listing category. If it violates or doesn't match the age rating guidelines, it will not be approved. (Източник: https://www.huaweicentral.com/huawei-appgallery-gets-new-apps-age-ratings/)

HarmonyOS App Release Steps on AppGallery. Step 1: Finish developing and testing - make sure you have a properly functioning application. Step 2: Build .app file - go to Build in the upper bar, select Build Hap(s) / App(s) and click Build App(s). File location: project > build > output > app > release > appname-release-signed.app. Step 3: Open App Gallery Connect Console - access My Apps section, locate your HarmonyOS app, press the release button. Step 4: Configure app information - Country/Region selection; Upload the signed .app file (not .hap); Payment Information; In-app Purchases; Content Rating; Privacy Statement and Tags; Copyright Information; Reviewer sign-in details (if needed); Release Time preference. Step 5: Version Information Selection - click Save and select your app version. Step 6: Submit your app - click Submit. Step 7: Check your app in AppGallery Platform. HarmonyOS приложението е отделно приложение с отделен bundleName/App ID и не може да се пуска извън континентален Китай. (Източник: https://medium.com/huawei-developers/harmony-os-how-to-release-an-app-948f45c170a7)
